title: Fuzzy Research-Oriented Discovery Request
prompt: We think admins hate the current seat management flow, but we are not sure whether the real issue is permissions, procurement, or guest users.

assertions.name: produces-intake-brief
assertions.description: Produces an explicit intake artifact or equivalent routing summary that keeps the entry decision observable

assertions.name: recognizes-fuzzy-direction
assertions.description: Recognizes that the route is a discovery path but the product direction is still fuzzy

assertions.name: hands-off-to-problem-framing
assertions.description: Hands off to problem-framing or an equivalent discovery skill rather than trying to do the framing itself

assertions.name: captures-routing-observability
assertions.description: Captures the key risks, unanswered questions, or routing reasons needed by the downstream skill

assertions.name: keeps-question-load-low
assertions.description: Keeps the question budget low and focused on routing, not on a full discovery interview
